mapper.sql: SELECT CHNNL_MK_CD as chnnlMkCd, NTNL_CD as ntnlCd, IN_IDENT as inIdent, ERR_CD as errCd, ERR_MODE as errMode, ERR_MSG as errMsg, ERR_MSG1 as errMsg1, ERR_MSG2 as errMsg2, ERR_MSG3 as errMsg3, ERR_MSG4 as errMsg4, ERR_MSG5 as errMsg5, ERR_MSG6 as errMsg6, ERR_MSG7 as errMsg7, USE_FLG as useFlg, ERR_INFO_SLCT_FLG as errInfoSlctFlg FROM ALL_CHNNL_ERR_MGT WHERE 1=1
mapper.select: AND CHNNL_MK_CD = #{chnnlMkCd} AND USE_FLG = 'Y' ORDER BY ERR_CD WITH UR
